backstory.original: Gale of Waterdeep was a prodigious archmage, his talents earning him the attention of Mystra, the goddess of magic. At her side, he learned all that mortals might accomplish with the Weave, in time earning his place as her lover, and her Chosen. And yet, he was not satisfied. In an attempt to prove he was ready for even greater power, he accidentally unleashed 'the orb' - a highly volatile fragment of pure Weave, corrupted by Netherese magic, which buried itself in his chest. Cast out by Mystra, humbled by his downfall, he does all he can to prevent the orb's cataclysmic detonation, watching for his chance to get back everything he lost, and more.
backstory.display: 深水城的盖尔是一位了不起的大法师，他的才华为他赢得了魔法女神密斯特拉的注意。在女神之侧，盖尔学会了凡人通过魔网可能完成的一切，并及时赢得了他作为女神的情人和天选者的位置。然而，他还没有满足。在尝试证明自己已经准备好接受更大力量的时候，他意外放出了“球体”- 受到耐瑟瑞尔魔法腐坏、极不稳定的纯粹魔网碎片；后者深埋进了他的体内。被密斯特拉逐出的他，因为自己的失势而变得自惭；他竭尽全力，意图阻止“球体”的灾难性爆炸，寻找机会夺回他失去的一切，甚至更多。

description.original: Gale deals 1 hit to a random enemy, prioritizing enemies he hasn't hit yet.
description.display: 盖尔对 1 名随机敌人造成 1 次击中，优先选择其之前未曾击中的敌人。

description.original: Gale knocks back all enemies, dealing ultimate damage and slowing them for 15 seconds.
description.display: 盖尔击退所有敌人，造成杀招伤害并使其减速 15 秒。

longDescription.original: Gale casts Gust of Wind, knocking back all enemies, dealing ultimate damage and slowing them for 15 seconds.
longDescription.display: 盖尔施放“阵风”击退所有敌人，造成杀招伤害并缓慢敌人 15 秒。

description.desc: As an Ally of Elminster, Gale can be used in any Elminster Patron adventure or variant, even if he would not normally be available to be used due to variant or patron restrictions.
作为艾尔明斯特的盟友，盖尔可用于任何艾尔明斯特赞助者冒险或支线任务，即使以前由于支线任务或赞助者限制条件无法使用。

conditions.desc: Gale increases the damage of Champions in the three columns in front of him by $(amount)%.
Gale increases the damage of Champions in his column and the column behind him by $(amount)%.
Gale increases the damage of Champions in the two columns in front of him by $(amount)%.
盖尔会提高他前面三列勇士的伤害 $(amount)%。
盖尔提高同列和后列的勇士伤害 $(amount)%。
盖尔会提高他前面两列勇士的伤害 $(amount)%。

tipText.original: Gale increases the damage of Champions in the two columns in front of him.
tipText.display: 盖尔会提高他前面两列勇士的伤害。

description.desc: The first time Gale damages any enemy, they take $(amount)% additional damage from all subsequent attacks.
盖尔首次伤害任意敌人时，敌人会从所有后续攻击受到额外 $(amount)% 伤害。

tipText.original: The power of the Netherese Orb leaves enemies that Gale damages vulnerable to all subsequent attacks.
tipText.display: 耐瑟瑞尔球体的力量令被盖尔伤害过的敌人易于受到所有后续攻击的伤害。

description.desc: Gale's Fire Bolt deals damage to all enemies in a small area.
盖尔的“火焰箭”对小范围内的所有敌人造成伤害。

specializationDescription.original: Gale embraces the explosive school of Evocation.
specializationDescription.display: 盖尔信奉热衷爆炸的召唤学派。

description.desc: Gale gains the Control role and attacks against Champions miss $(amount)% of the time.
盖尔获得控制者角色，针对勇士们的攻击会有 $(amount)% 落空。

specializationDescription.original: Gale focuses on the protective school of Abjuration.
specializationDescription.display: 盖尔注重断绝的防护学派。

description.desc: Increases Archmage's Insight's number of columns by one.
“大法师的洞察”的队列数增加一。

specializationDescription.original: Gale immerses himself in the captivating school of Enchantment.
specializationDescription.display: 盖尔沉浸于令人神往的附魔学派。

description.desc: Archmage's Insight now affects his column and the column behind, and enemies that attempt to choose Gale as a target instead choose to attack another Champion, assuming another valid target exists.
“大法师的洞察”现在会影响自己的列和背后一列，且尝试选择盖尔为目标的敌人现在会改为攻击另一勇士（假定存在另一有效目标）。

specializationDescription.original: Gale envelops himself in the deceptive school of Illusion.
specializationDescription.display: 盖尔浸淫在欺骗性十足的幻觉学派之中。

description.desc: Your formation gains one Ceremorphosis stack due to the mind flayer tadpole in Gale's brain. Gale increases the damage of Netherese Orb by $(amount)% for each Ceremorphosis stack, stacking multiplicatively.
盖尔大脑中的夺心魔蝌蚪使你的阵型获得一层“蜕变”堆叠。每有一层蜕变堆叠，盖尔的“耐瑟瑞尔球体”伤害提升 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Gale seeks out other companions suffering from the fate of Ceremorphosis.
specializationDescription.display: 盖尔在寻找其他遭受蜕变命运折磨的同伴。

description.desc: Gale increases the effect of Netherese Orb by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation with an Intelligence of $(min_stat_value___2) or higher, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位智力高于或等于 $(min_stat_value___2) 的勇士，盖尔令“耐瑟瑞尔球体”的效果提高 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中智力 13+ 的勇士数量：$num_stacks___2

specializationDescription.original: Gale teaches intelligent companions the secrets of the Weave.
specializationDescription.display: 盖尔向聪慧的同伴教授魔网之秘。

description.desc: Gale increases the effect of Netherese Orb by $(amount)% for each Champion you have unlocked that is not eligible for the current adventure, stacking multiplicatively.
你解锁的每个不符合当前冒险限制条件的勇士均使盖尔的“耐瑟瑞尔球体”效果提高 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Gale seeks out the limited number of allies that can complete the adventure.
specializationDescription.display: 盖尔寻求可以完成冒险的有限数量伙伴。

description.desc: Gale increases the effect of Archmage's Insight by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Elminster Patron variant you have completed, stacking multiplicatively.
每完成一个艾尔明斯特赞助者支线任务，均使盖尔的“大法师的洞察”效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

effect_keys.stack_title: 艾尔明斯特赞助者支线任务已完成

description.original: If it's me or the realms - I'll save the realms every time.
description.display: 若要在我和国度中做出选择，我每次都会拯救国度。

description.original: Their magic is strong, but our will is stronger!
description.display: 他们的魔法很强大，但我们的意志更胜一筹！

description.original: It's not as easy for me as a sorcerer or warlock. No offense, Wyll.
description.display: 对我来说，这不像术士或邪术师那么容易。无意冒犯，瓦尔。

description.original: I've had experiences that other wizards can only dream of.
description.display: 我拥有其他法师梦寐以求的经历。

description.original: You can't manipulate the entire Weave, merely a small piece of it.
description.display: 你无法操纵整个魔网，只能挑拨其中的一小部分。

description.original: Maybe I was wrong, as rare of an event as that is. This power is strong!
description.display: 也许我错了，这是非常罕见的情况。这力量太强大了！

description.original: It has a nice ring to it, don't you think? Gale of Waterdeep!
description.display: 听起来很有派头，你不觉得吗？深水城的盖尔！

description.original: One day, my name will be known up and down the Sword Coast!
description.display: 总有一天，我的名字会响彻剑湾！

description.original: These are certainly things Elminster wouldn't have taught me...
description.display: 艾尔明斯特肯定不会教我这些……

effects.description: Increases the effect of Gale's $(ability_list ids) by $(amount)%

description.original: The risk is worth the reward. This could be just what we need to save everyone!
description.display: 高风险，高回报。这可能正是我们拯救大家所需要的！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Gale's $(ability_list ids) by $(amount)%

description.display: 我的想法会改变……有时会。

description.original: Magic can be elegant, but sometimes, a good fireball is the answer.
description.display: 魔法虽然优雅，但有时，一个大火球就是答案。

description.original: Just stare at the stars with me a bit longer.
description.display: 和我再多看一会儿星星吧。
啊-特兰密斯特拉-瑞尔坎特拉赫-奥……

description.original: If Mystra will not hear my pleas, I shall seek succor elsewhere.
description.display: 如果密斯特拉不理会我的哀求，我将到别处寻求慰藉。

description.original: Mark my words well. My name will be counted among the greatest wizards of all worlds!
description.display: 记住我这句话。我的名字必将被列入诸界最伟大的法师之列！

name.original: Order of the Red Robes Gale

character_sheet_details.backstory: Gale of Waterdeep was a prodigious archmage, his talents earning him the attention of Mystra, the goddess of magic. At her side, he learned all that mortals might accomplish with the Weave, in time earning his place as her lover, and her Chosen. And yet, he was not satisfied. In an attempt to prove he was ready for even greater power, he accidentally unleashed 'the orb' - a highly volatile fragment of pure Weave, corrupted by Netherese magic, which buried itself in his chest. Cast out by Mystra, humbled by his downfall, he does all he can to prevent the orb's cataclysmic detonation, watching for his chance to get back everything he lost, and more.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Gale supports Champions in the two columns ahead of him and debuffs monsters the first time he attacks them. Elminster grants Gale access to all his patron adventures and variants.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 深水城的盖尔是一位了不起的大法师，他的才华为他赢得了魔法女神密斯特拉的注意。在女神之侧，盖尔学会了凡人通过魔网可能完成的一切，并及时赢得了他作为女神的情人和天选者的位置。然而，他还没有满足。在尝试证明自己已经准备好接受更大力量的时候，他意外放出了“球体”- 受到耐瑟瑞尔魔法腐坏、极不稳定的纯粹魔网碎片；后者深埋进了他的体内。被密斯特拉逐出的他，因为自己的失势而变得自惭；他竭尽全力，意图阻止“球体”的灾难性爆炸，寻找机会夺回他失去的一切，甚至更多。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 盖尔会支援自己前方两列的勇士，并减益自己初次攻击的怪物。艾尔明斯特给予盖尔进行自己所有赞助者冒险和支线任务的权利。
